title: LEGO Star Wars 75345 501st Clone Troopers Battle Pack Set - Collectible Building Toy with an AV-7 Cannon & 4 Minifigures - Gift for 6+ Year Old Boys & The Clone Wars Fans
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Clone Trooper Battle Pack – With this Star Wars building toy for 6+ year old boys and girls, kids recreate The Clone Wars scenes with 4 minifigures and an anti-vehicle cannon
4 LEGO Star Wars minifigures – Includes a 501st legion Officer, Clone Specialist and 2 Heavy Trooper minifigures, all with weapon elements
Creative toys – Fans will have fun recreating scenes with the AV-7 Anti-Vehicle Cannon which includes a minifigure seat, adjustable legs, a liftable cannon, and a spring-loaded shooter
Star Wars gift for kids – This portable Star Wars travel toy makes a cool birthday gift for 6+ year old boys, girls and older fans of Star Wars: The Clone Wars and Star Wars: The Bad Batch
Digital guide – The LEGO Builder app provides kids with digital tools that guide them through a unique and fun building experience
description: From the manufacturer Clone Troopers building toy for action play Kids can build their own 501st Clone Troopers squadron with this LEGO Star Wars Battle Pack. Hours of imaginative play Young fans will love recreating Star Wars: The Clone Wars scenes and taking command of their own missions. LEGO Star Wars 501st Clone Troopers Battle Pack 4 LEGO Star Wars minifigures Includes a 501st Officer and a 501st Clone Specialist. LEGO minifigure weapons A blaster pistol, blaster rifle and 2 blasters. AV-7 anti-vehicle cannon Activate the spring-loaded shooter. Enter a new world of building Kids can zoom in, rotate and track their progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. Awesome treat for kids This set makes a great anytime gift for children who are into Star Wars: The Clone Wars and Star Wars: The Bad Batch.
